evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1111.1 across 32 VALID_0DTE trades but owns the global -527 MAE. The worst tail had ES-VWAP 26.20, negative VWAP acceleration, pullback-from-high 9.75, rolling-high distance 14.75, no positive move before MAE, and first profit only after 80.3 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners show similar extension can resolve quickly.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: A static config proxy can still block clean high-extension winners; a path-aware classifier must prove it preserves protected fast extended-VWAP trades.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast-winner count, total net profit >=98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.
